query: MRI sequences rectal cancer brachytherapy T2W DWI recommended protocols

results.title: Prenatal cfDNA Sequencing and Incidental Detection of Maternal Cancer.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 39774314. 2024/12/05 00:00. BACKGROUND: Cell-free DNA (cfDNA) sequence analysis to screen for fetal 
aneuploidy can incidentally detect maternal cancer. Additional data are needed 
to identify DNA-sequencing patterns and other biomarkers that can identify 
pregnant persons who are most likely to have cancer and to determine the best 
approach for follow-up.
METHODS: In this ongoing study we performed cancer screening in pregnant or 
postpartum persons who did not perceive signs or sym
